texto: public display and operatic suffering—an in-your-face owning of one’s vulnerability and fucked-upness to the point of embarrassing and offending tight-asses is a powerful feminist strategy. Writing is tough work, I don’t see how anyone can really write from a position of weakness. Sometimes I may start out in that position, but the act of commandeering words flips me into a position of power.
explicacao: Citação de Dodie Bellamy sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “public display and operatic suffering—an in-your-face owning of one’s vulnerability and fucked-up…” articula trabalho, feminism, writing em registro de trabalho, com relevância para contextos como termino e trabalho.
